stories.title: Deadlock over Iran's nuclear program and the Strait of Hormuz cripples peace efforts
stories.description: Two months after the U.S.-Israeli attack on Iran started the war, peace talks are on hold, with control of the Strait of Hormuz and the future of Iran's nuclear program as the two main points of contention.

stories.title: Russian superyacht sails through Strait of Hormuz despite blockade
stories.description: The 141m-long vessel, linked to a close ally of Russian President Vladimir Putin, cleared the waterway despite an ongoing blockade.

stories.title: Israeli strikes kill 14 in Lebanon amid ongoing ceasefire
stories.description: The US announced three days ago that the ceasefire was extended by three weeks after talks.

stories.title: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
stories.description: Iran had earlier said there were no plans for a direct meeting with a US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.

stories.title: Netanyahu orders army to 'vigorously attack' Hezbollah in Lebanon
stories.description: The Israeli PM's directive comes as six people were killed by strikes in Lebanon despite a ceasefire being extended by three weeks.

stories.title: Who is making decisions in Iran?
stories.description: Iran's new supreme leader is supposed to have the final say, but in practice the picture is far murkier.

stories.title: Trump says Israel-Lebanon ceasefire to be extended by three weeks
stories.description: Envoys from the two countries met in Washington as the fragile truce was due to expire on Sunday.

stories.title: US boards ship carrying Iran oil as Trump threatens mine-laying vessels
stories.description: Central Command said it has intercepted 33 vessels since imposing a blockade on ships coming to and from Iran.

stories.title: Couple discovers Lebanon home destroyed by Israel from satellite image
stories.description: Joe Elias contacted BBC Verify following reports that his village was among several destroyed by Israeli forces.

stories.title: What we know about the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
stories.description: A 10-day truce between the two countries has been extended by three weeks after talks in Washington.

stories.title: In Tehran, money is short and a return to war looms over daily life
stories.description: The BBC's Lyse Doucet reports from Iran, where the buzz of busy shopping streets masks deep uncertainty over the country's future.

stories.title: Middle East war live: Trump says Iran has been 'militarily defeated' at state dinner
stories.description: US President Donald Trump told Britain's King Charles III and other guests at a state dinner Tuesday that Iran has been "militarily defeated", in his first public comments on the sensitive topic during the ongoing royal visit. Follow our liveblog for the latest developments.

stories.title: Iran talks stall amid Hormuz tensions and ceasefire violations in Lebanon
stories.description: Efforts to revive talks over the Middle East war have stalled as the US weighs Iran’s latest proposal on reopening the Strait of Hormuz, a key oil route. Tensions in Lebanon continue to escalate despite a fragile ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah.

stories.title: Continuing hostilities in Lebanon as 1.2 million displaced sink into despair
stories.description: Despite a U.S.-brokered ceasefire, Israel has continued striking Lebanon and its troops are occupying a strip of the south, destroying homes they describe as Hezbollah infrastructure. Hezbollah, meanwhile, has kept up attacks against Israeli troops in Lebanon and on northern Isra...

stories.title: Charles on a mission: Can king's state visit salvage US-UK ties?
stories.description: Call it the royal trump card: King Charles dispatched to Washington on a state visit at the lowest point in the Special Relationship in at least seven decades. We'll ask if catering to Donald Trump's enthusiasm for the British crown can dispel the bad blood over tariffs, the war ...

stories.title: UN aid chief says situation in Somalia worsened by US war on Iran
stories.description: UN relief coordinator Tom Fletcher has slammed the war on Iran during a visit to Somalia.

stories.title: Lebanon’s PM slams Israel’s ‘war crimes’ as attack kills 3 rescue workers
stories.description: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun says Israel violating international law that protects civilians and humanitarian workers.

stories.title: UAE quits OPEC as oil cartel takes blow during war on Iran
stories.description: The UAE’s decision to quit OPEC to prioritise its ‘national interests’ deals a blow to the oil group.

stories.title: Iran war live: Trump says Tehran wants end to blockade; Israel kills medics
stories.description: US president says Iran has reached out and asked Washington to lift its naval blockade on Iranian ports.

stories.title: As US-Iran talks remain ‘stalled’, experts warn of ‘long-term disruptions’
stories.description: With the two sides locked in a standoff, oil prices have continued to soar.

stories.title: Trump scolds Germany’s Merz for criticism of Iran war
stories.description: US president says German chancellor 'doesn't know what he's talking about', defends war on Iran as necessary.

stories.title: After 60 days of war in Iran, does US Congress want a say?
stories.description: Under law, Trump needs Congressional approval to continue war, experts say, but Congress may avoid the issue altogether.

stories.title: Massive explosion from Israeli operation seen in southern Lebanon
stories.description: Video captured massive explosions in southern Lebanon in what the Israeli military called strikes on a Hezbollah tunnel.

stories.title: King Charles, Trump toast ties despite Iran tensions
stories.description: Britain’s King Charles and Donald Trump hailed their countries’ longstanding ties at a White House state dinner Tuesday – despite the US president claiming the monarch agreed with him on Iran’s nuclear weapons. Over a lavish meal, Charles echoed the tone of his earlier speech to ...

stories.title: Iran expected to make new offer to ‘reluctant’ US
stories.description: • Iranian envoy lauds Pakistan for ‘persistent labour’ to pave way for dialogue• Trump claims Tehran asked him to lift Hormuz blockade• Spy agencies studying ‘likely response’ to US declaring victory• Iran’s military says ‘still in state of war’• Vance questions Pentagon assessme...

stories.title: 5 sentenced to life in Bahrain for plotting 'terrorist acts' with Iran
stories.description: Five people were sentenced to life in Bahrain on Tuesday for plotting “terrorist and hostile acts” with Iran, which bombarded the tiny Gulf state during the Middle East war. Two Afghans and three Bahrainis were convicted and a fourth Bahraini was acquitted by the High Criminal Co...

stories.title: Britain's King Charles meets Trump in bid to salvage ties
stories.description: Britain’s King Charles III met Donald Trump at the White House early Tuesday, kicking off a high-stakes state visit shadowed by transatlantic tensions and a new alleged attempt to assassinate the US president. Behind the warm welcome for Charles and Queen Camilla in front of the ...

stories.title: Russia backs Iran as peace efforts with US remain stalled
stories.description: • Putin says Moscow will do everything to secure peace deal• Araghchi blames ‘excessive US demands’ for failure of dialogue• White House stays mum as Trump meets security aides to discuss Tehran’s proposal• Rubio says Iran ‘serious’ about deal, cites bleak economic outlook• Iran,...

stories.title: US spy agencies examine how Iran would react to Trump declaring victory: sources
stories.description: US intelligence agencies are studying how Iran would respond if President Donald Trump were to declare a unilateral victory in the two-month-old war that ​has killed thousands and become a political liability for the White House, two US officials and a person familiar with the ma...

stories.title: Israel-Iran war LIVE: Tehran labels U.S. ship seizures 'piracy' in formal protest to UN Secretary-General
stories.description: The envoy argued that Washington's justification for the maritime interceptions lacked any standing under global statutes

stories.title: UAE leaves OPEC and OPEC+ in huge blow to global oil producers' group
stories.description: The move came after the UAE, a regional business hub and one of Washington’s most important allies, criticised fellow Arab states for not doing enough to protect it from numerous Iranian attacks during the war

stories.title: U.S. imposes sanctions on 35 individuals, entities for aiding Iran's sanctions evasions
stories.description: The designations were intended to expose and disrupt the mechanisms used by Tehran to receive payment for oil and other commodities and reduce its revenue, Treasury said

stories.title: Trump says King Charles does not want Iran to have nuclear weapon
stories.description: The event was held on the second ‌day of a four-day visit to the United States at a tense time in ties, ‌after Mr. Trump has repeatedly criticized British Prime Minister ‌Keir ⁠Starmer for what Mr. Trump calls lack of ⁠help in prosecuting the Iran war

stories.title: U.S. Marines board merchant ship in Arabian Sea suspected to be headed to Iran
stories.description: CENTCOM said U.S. forces released the vessel after conducting a search and confirming the ship's voyage would not include an Iranian port call

stories.title: Israel-Iran war updates: Trump claims Iran 'just' informed U.S. it's in 'state of collapse'
stories.description: Ceasefire efforts appears at a standstill, with Iran saying Washington could no longer dictate terms

stories.title: US Congress Democrats may sue Trump over operation in Iran — Time
stories.description: The newspaper reports that under the 1973 War Powers Resolution, the US president had 60 days to continue military action without legislative approval, that is, until May 1

stories.title: Iran to neither surrender nor negotiate under pressure — ambassador to Cairo
stories.description: Mojtaba Ferdowsi Pour says that Tehran does not plan to discuss its missile program or the so-called "Axis of Resistance" during negotiations with the US

stories.title: US president instructs aides to prepare for prolonged blockade of Iran — WSJ
stories.description: According to sources cited by the newspaper, Donald Trump believes that other options, such as resuming bombing or exiting the conflict, carry greater risks

stories.title: No payment received by Iran for Japanese tanker’s passage through Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Sources in the Japanese government told the newspaper Nikkei that this was made possible thanks to negotiations with the Iranian side
